description: Add retry config file. Pure new-file task, no destructive verbs. Should pass.
request_text: Create config/retry.json with default retry policy (max_attempts=3, backoff=exponential).
normalized_request: Create config/retry.json with default retry policy.
diff:
diff --git a/config/retry.json b/config/retry.json
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..1111111
--- /dev/null
+++ b/config/retry.json
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+{
+  "max_attempts": 3,
+  "backoff": "exponential"
+}
